overall_shopper_takeaway: For the safest all-around first serious carry-on, choose Travelpro because it has the clearest specs, strong travel-use language, a useful domestic airline-fit caveat, and the most complete feature and warranty information. [Travelpro] For maximum stated capacity and convenience features, choose BEIS, but double-check airline size and weight limits before relying on it as a strict carry-on. [BEIS] For style, polished organization, and security details, Delsey is compelling, but the Carry-On Plus size is better supported for most US airlines than for stricter international use.
